case_title: JOY JEFFRIES ET AL VS. LUIS GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,098.08 FILED BY JEFFRIES, JOY ARMSTRONG, CHARLIE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS DBA CESAR CHAVEZ AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 WAIVER SERVED SEP-02-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS DBA CESAR CHAVEZ AUTO SERVICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFRIES, JOY ARMSTRONG, CHARLIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS DBA CESAR CHAVEZ AUTO SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS JOY JEFFRIES AND CHARLIE ARMSTRONG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LUIS GONZALEZ DBA CESAR CHAVEZ AUTO SERVICE'S REPRESENTATIVE ALEJANDRA ARIAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFRIES, JOY ARMSTRONG, CHARLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS DBA CESAR CHAVEZ AUTO SERVICE THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT SUPPORT THE CONCLUSION THAT THE OIL CHANGE PERFORMED BY DEFENDANT CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
